title: Tell me about yourself — новые слова

items.example: You don't have to dress smartly but you should look clean.
Speak clearly and try to offer full answers.
Shake hands firmly and make eye contact.
Arrive on time. Fifteen minutes early is OK.
Be prepared. Do some research about the company.
Do some research about the university before the interview.
Show enthusiasm by smiling and asking questions.
Don't avoid eye contact. Look at them during the interview.
First impressions are important, so make eye contact.
I have a query about the schedule.
